name: io.github.farhan-syah/zenith
description: Author, validate, and render deterministic .zen design documents (KDL → PNG/PDF). A token-efficient MCP surface: schema/validate/inspect/tokens/tx/render/fmt/merge/theme plus the scratch→promote→finalize workspace loop, with on-demand schema lookup and resource-link artifacts.

runtimeArguments.description: Run the installed `zenith` binary as an MCP server over stdio.
